title: Shobhaa De | TCS ki ‘Duniya mein, logo ko dhoka kabhi ho jata hai’
description: In this insanely entertaining film (a spicy South Indian masala dosa genre), this “cabaret” from Apna Desh (1972), struck out for multiple reasons, not the least being the absurdity of the sequence -- the unmatched combo of Asha and R.D. Burman, matching tempos, modulated voices and heavy breathing to Anand Bakshi’s double-edged lyrics
